author: mark
text: Decoupled from epic bl-00ca: balls-plugin-github is a separate deliverable, not part of this repo. Lifecycle/core work for forge-gated delivery is tracked under bl-00ca; the plugin itself ships independently. (Claim by Suffusing left untouched.)

author: Suffusing
text:
Add balls-plugin-github forge-gate plugin

Implements the legacy plugin protocol (auth-setup, auth-check, push --task, sync) as a separate binary so deferred-delivery repos automate the forge round-trip: push opens/updates the PR for work/bl-xxxx and records pull_request under task.external.github; sync polls merge state and emits a sync-report that closes the auto-opened forge-gate child, unblocking the parent's bl close (SPEC-forge-gated-delivery 9).

All GitHub API and auth specifics live in balls::github; core stays forge-agnostic. The HTTP transport shells out to curl behind a Transport seam, so logic is unit-tested in-process with a fake and the real path is covered end-to-end against a localhost stub. Cargo/Makefile/README updated; 100% coverage, files under the 300-line cap.
